## TZ1.3. SECTION 3 – REGULATORY RESULT

### TZ1.3.1. ROMATSA NET GAIN/LOSS ON ACTIVITY IN THE ROMANIA TERMINAL CHARGING ZONE 1 IN 2025

ROMATSA reported a net loss of -6.3 MRON, as a combination of a loss of -11.6 MRON arising from the cost sharing mechanism, with a gain of +5.4 MRON arising from the traffic risk sharing mechanism.

### TZ1.3.2. ROMATSA OVERALL REGULATORY RESULT (RR) ON ACTIVITY IN THE TERMINAL CHARING ZONE 1

Ex-post, the overall RR taking into account the net loss from the terminal activity mentioned above (-6.3 MRON) and the actual RoE (+6.6 MRON) amounts to +0.3 MRON (0.2% of the terminal revenues). The resulting ex-post rate of return on equity is 0.5%, which is lower than the 
12.7% planned in the PP.

### TZ1.3.3. NOTES

### TZ1.3.3.1. NOTE 1

### TZ1.3.3.2. NOTE 2
